feed.title: Organ music from Trinity United Reformed Church High Wycombe

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs
Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Organ music - Sunday, 21st June 2026 - #EveryFriday #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Organ music from Trinity United Reformed Church, High Wycombe. Join us for worship every Sunday #AllAreWelcome
- Subscribe to receive notifications 🔔 when we post new pieces. - Like our concerts ❤️ or leave a comment on your favourite musical moment. 🙏 - Share this video with friends and family to spread the light of God's word. 🔄 - Can you name the music or spot where the photos are from? Let us know in the comments
Where to find us: https://goo.gl/maps/2TCLpBvVymaCcJeM6?coh=178571&entry=tt Website: https://www.trinity-urc.org.uk Podcasts: https://anchor.fm/trinitycoresend-1year-ago Twitter: https://twitter.com/trinity_urc Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/trinity_urc/ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TrinityHighWycombe What's on: https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/o/trinity-and-cores-end-united-reformed-churches-32072022553 Mastodon: https://mastodon.social/@trinityhighwycombe Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/trinityhighwycombe.bsky.social
#OrganMusic #Church #God #Relax #Mindfulness #OrganRecital #TakeItEasy #urc #UnitedReformedChurch #TrinityChurch #ChurchOrgan #Music #PipeOrgan #PhotoTour #Nature #Photography #Organ #Jesus #Worship #NameThatTune #WhatsThatSound #Concert #Music #Photos #FreeEntry #NoCharge #Photograph #Photography
#EveryFriday #FridayFeature #FridayFanfare
Experience majestic organ music from our welcoming sanctuary 🎹 Enjoy this series of short concerts featuring our stunning Pipe Organ Immerse your spirit in this musical experience as our organists perform some of the best organ music we have. Let the music wash over you and relieve the stresses of life. 🎵
#TrinityHighWycombe #Sunsets

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Organ music - Sunday, 14th June 2026 - #EveryFriday #AllAreWelcome
media:group.media:description:
Organ music from Trinity United Reformed Church, High Wycombe. Join us for worship every Sunday #AllAreWelcome
- Subscribe to receive notifications 🔔 when we post new pieces. - Like our concerts ❤️ or leave a comment on your favourite musical moment. 🙏 - Share this video with friends and family to spread the light of God's word. 🔄 - Can you name the music or spot where the photos are from? #EveryFriday #FridayFeature #FridayFanfare
Experience majestic organ music from our welcoming sanctuary 🎹 Enjoy this series of short concerts featuring our stunning Pipe Organ Immerse your spirit in this musical experience as our organists perform some of the best organ music we have. Let the music wash over you and relieve the stresses of life. 🎵
#TrinityHighWycombe

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Blessings - Sunday, 29th March 2026 - #AllAreWelcome #EveryWednesday
media:group.media:description:
Blessings from Trinity United Reformed Church High Wycombe
- Join us for worship every Sunday #AllAreWelcome - Subscribe to receive notifications when we post new blessings and other items . - Like our blessings ❤️ or leave a comment sharing what they mean to you. 🙏 - Share this video with friends and family to spread the light of God's word. 🔄
Where to find us: https://goo.gl/maps/2TCLpBvVymaCcJeM6?coh=178571&entry=tt Website: https://www.trinity-urc.org.uk Podcasts: https://anchor.fm/trinitycoresend-1year-ago Twitter: https://twitter.com/trinity_urc Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/trinity_urc/ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TrinityHighWycombe What's on: https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/o/trinity-and-cores-end-united-reformed-churches-32072022553 Mastodon: https://mastodon.social/@trinityhighwycombe Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/trinityhighwycombe.bsky.social
#Blessings #Church #God #YoutubeShorts #Shorts #Relax #Mindfulness #TakeItEasy #BirdSounds #Garden #urc #UnitedReformedChurch #reels #TrinityChurch #KnowThatYouAreLoved #Jesus #BlessingsToYou #EveryWednesday #WednesdayInspiration
Need inspiration and encouragement to start your week off right? Let our blessing sink deep into your spirit and uplift you through the trials and victories ahead. 👂🔥
#TrinityHighWycombe #ParalympicsGB #Paralympics @MilanoCortina2026WinterGames #Cortina #NinaSparks #TeamGB #Snowboard #Paralympian

Experience majestic organ music from our welcoming sanctuary 🎹 Enjoy this series of short concerts featuring our stunning Pipe Organ Immerse your spirit in this musical experience as our organists perform some of the best organ music we have. Let the music wash over you and relieve the stresses of life. 🎵
